import os
from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
from flask_cors import CORS
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from geopy.distance import geodesic

load_dotenv()

app = Flask(__name__)
CORS(app)

events_db = [
    {"id": 1, "name": "Concierto Rock", "latitude": 28.6353, "longitude": -106.0889, "date": "2026-07-10", "category": "Música"},
    {"id": 2, "name": "Feria del Hueso", "latitude": 28.6200, "longitude": -106.0700, "date": "2026-11-02", "category": "Cultura"}
]

@app.route('/events/nearby', methods=['GET'])
def get_nearby_events():
    user_lat = request.args.get('lat', type=float)
    user_lng = request.args.get('lng', type=float)
    if not user_lat or not user_lng:
        return jsonify({"error": "Faltan coordenadas"}), 400
    user_coords = (user_lat, user_lng)
    nearby_events = []
    for event in events_db:
        event_coords = (event['latitude'], event['longitude'])
        distance_km = geodesic(user_coords, event_coords).kilometers
        if distance_km <= 10:
            event_data = event.copy()
            event_data['distance'] = f"{distance_km:.2f} km"
            nearby_events.append(event_data)
    return jsonify(nearby_events)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    port = int(os.getenv('PORT', 5000))
    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=port, debug=True)
